requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic and radio compliance, including cordless equipment
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容与无线电合规
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容與無線電合規

summary.en: Peru does not run a CE-like single mandatory EMC law for all power tools. Non-radio models are handled through product-specific NTP or applicable technical regulation scope. Any cordless model with wireless function (Bluetooth, WiFi module, remote control, NFC, or similar transmitter) requires MTC homologation and registry approval before the model may be marketed or used.
summary.zh: 秘鲁不存在覆盖全部电动工具的欧盟式单一 EMC 强制制度。非无线产品通常在适用的 NTP 或技术规章下处理。任何具无线功能（如蓝牙、WiFi 模块、遥控、NFC 等）的无绳工具，在销售和使用前均需 MTC 型号核准及入网登记。
summary.zht: 祕魯不存在覆蓋全部電動工具的歐盟式單一 EMC 強制制度。非無線產品通常在適用的 NTP 或技術規章下處理。任何具無線功能（如藍牙、WiFi 模組、遙控、NFC 等）的無繩工具，在銷售和使用前均需 MTC 型號核准及入網登記。

standards_or_laws: MTC equipment homologation for transmitter-capable products before market placement
No standalone mandatory EMC Directive equivalent for all power tools

summary.en: China uses GB/T 9254 series and related EMI testing for many electronics, and radio modules with transmitter functions need SRRC approval under domestic spectrum rules. This does not replace Peru MTC homologation requirements, which are model- and market-specific.
summary.zh: 中国在许多电子设备上使用 GB/T 9254 系列进行电磁兼容测试，带无线发射功能的模块也需按国内频率规则取得 SRRC 批准。该证据不能替代秘鲁 MTC 型号核准，后者为市场特定型号要求。
summary.zht: 中國在許多電子設備上使用 GB/T 9254 系列進行電磁相容測試，帶無線發射功能的模組也需按國內頻率規則取得 SRRC 批准。該證據不能替代祕魯 MTC 型號核准，後者為市場特定型號要求。

gap.en: The gap is usually one of scope and homologation model. A China SRRC or GB/T EMC report may support engineering review, but Peru requires a separate MTC homologation step for cordless models with transmitters. Non-radio models without a transmission function do not need radio homologation but still need the import regulatory pathway.
gap.zh: 常见差距在于范围和型号核准。中国 SRRC 或 GB/T EMC 报告可用于技术审查，但对有发射功能的无绳工具，秘鲁仍需单独 MTC 型号核准。无无线发射功能的非无线产品不需要无线电核准，但仍需走入境技术/市场路径。
gap.zht: 常見差距在於範圍和型號核准。中國 SRRC 或 GB/T EMC 報告可用於技術審查，但對有發射功能的無繩工具，祕魯仍需單獨 MTC 型號核准。無無線發射功能的非無線產品不需要無線電核准，但仍需走入境技術/市場路徑。

target.en: Mandatory legal obligation only where the model has wireless transmission: MTC homologation and model registration before market entry. No standalone mandatory CE-style EMC mark for non-radio power tools.
target.zh: 若产品带无线发射功能，则 MTC 型号核准与型号注册是强制义务；非无线电电动工具不存在 CE 式独立 EMC 标志强制。
target.zht: 若產品帶無線發射功能，則 MTC 型號核准與型號註冊是強制義務；非無線電電動工具不存在 CE 式獨立 EMC 標誌強制。

cn.en: China GB/T and SRRC evidence is common technical evidence where applicable, but is not equivalent to Peru MTC obligations.
cn.zh: 中国 GB/T 与 SRRC 证据常见于技术证据，但不等同于秘鲁 MTC 义务。
cn.zht: 中國 GB/T 與 SRRC 證據常見於技術證據，但不等同於祕魯 MTC 義務。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Peru-ready for radio-capable cordless tools until MTC homologation and registry listing are completed for each marketed model. Non-radio models still need import-regulation mapping and importer accountability, but do not have a separate mandatory EU-style EMC mark.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对具无线能力的无绳工具，在完成每个销售型号的 MTC 型号核准与登记前不能视为秘鲁就绪。非无线电型号仍需完成入境规章映射和进口商责任，但不存在独立欧盟式 EMC 标志义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對具無線能力的無繩工具，在完成每個銷售型號的 MTC 型號核准與登記前不能視為祕魯就緒。非無線電型號仍需完成入境規章映射和進口商責任，但不存在獨立歐盟式 EMC 標誌義務。
